title: Draft Operational Control Plan DOC-007
steps: Identify all core operational processes requiring control documentation
Draft procedural checklists for shift handover processes
Submit DOC-007 draft to QMS Manager for review
Train all operations staff on new procedure

title: Complete overdue supplier evaluation audits
steps: Compile list of all strategic suppliers requiring evaluation
Schedule and conduct supplier evaluation audits for top-5 vendors
Record all evaluation outcomes in supplier register
Submit completed records to QMS Manager

title: Approve IT Security Policy DOC-003
steps: Complete final review of DOC-003 draft
Obtain formal sign-off from ICT Director and QMS Manager
Publish approved version to document control system
